promotable_facts.fact: Jury trial waiver and punitive damages waiver — both parties waive right to jury trial and right to seek punitive, exemplary, consequential, or special damages (FA Section 17.0)
promotable_facts.action: Added jury_trial_waiver and punitive_damages_waiver to dispute_resolution in canonical

promotable_facts.fact: General release required at signing (not just renewal/transfer) — FA Section 16.8 requires franchisee to release franchisor from all pre-existing claims at execution of FA
promotable_facts.reader_report_section: Pass E: Contract Burden (from FA depth pass)

promotable_facts.fact: Economic Conditions Not a Defense — FA Section 16.10 explicitly states economic downturn, recession, or adverse market conditions are not a defense to franchisee obligations
promotable_facts.reader_report_section: Pass E: Contract Burden (from FA depth pass)

promotable_facts.fact: Data ownership — franchisor owns all data generated by or stored in computer systems (FA Section 10.4)
promotable_facts.action: Added data_ownership to technology in canonical

promotable_facts.fact: Consent/Business Judgment standard — franchisor may withhold consent in its business judgment; franchisee's sole remedy is specific performance, NO money damages (FA Section 16.6)
promotable_facts.reader_report_section: Pass E: Contract Burden (from FA depth pass)

promotable_facts.fact: HSM 2024 revenue breakdown: $19.6M rebates/allowances + $8.8M goods/services + $38.7M administrative fees = $67.1M from all brand franchisees
promotable_facts.promoted_to: Already partially in canonical; enriching with exact breakdown

promotable_facts.fact: Strategic Partnerships named: Small Luxury Hotels of the World (SLH), Autocamp, Evermore Resort, Field Station — these may compete within Restricted Area
promotable_facts.action: Added strategic_partnerships to territory in canonical

promotable_facts.fact: Interior Stylist ongoing cost: up to $50,000/year for ongoing accessorizing at least 2x/year
